title: dactylorchis foliosa
intro: Dactylorchis foliosa, also known as the autumn lady's tresses, is a rare orchid species found in the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dactylorchis foliosa include reducing inflammation, soothing irritated mucous membranes, and calming the nervous system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the roots and leaves, which can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
